items.title: Sinner on course for Masters record after reaching Madrid final
items.summary: World number one Jannik Sinner remains on course for a record fifth consecutive Masters 1,000 title after reaching the Madrid Open final with a straight-set win over Arthur Fils.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
